attr.title: Bullet Beat
attr.desc: Bullet Beat is a shoot'em up, where everything at the levels is in tune with the music, even shooting. You can also upload your track and enjoy the experimental generated levels! Keep the combo to get stronger!
attr.inst:
Purchase the game from Itch.io. Download Bullet Beat.exe and place it in ports/bulletbeat/assets.
You can add your own music files in the .ogg format to ports/bulletbeat/saves.
